title: openclaw/openclaw
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，强调用户数据所有权。它采用“龙虾方式”设计，支持多种平台，旨在提供用户自主控制的AI体验。项目在GitHub上获得38万+星标，热度极高。
summary_en: OpenClaw is a cross-platform, cross-OS personal AI assistant project that emphasizes user data ownership. Designed in 'the lobster way', it supports multiple platforms and aims to provide a user-controlled AI experience. The project has gained 380k+ stars on GitHub, indicating high popularity.
